mdRecord.dcterms:title: 1937 Virginia (Eastern Part, Including West Virginia) at the time of ratification of the Constitution, from original 1787 and 1775 maps in the Library of Congress at Washington, one made by Thomas Jefferson, the other by his father.
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Map of Virginia (Eastern Part, Including West Virginia) at the time of ratification of the Constitution, from original 1787 and 1775 maps in the Library of Congress at Washington, one made by Thomas Jefferson, the other by his father.
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
